case_title: ALYSSA ARNEY RESPONDENT VS. CENTERSTONE REALTY DBA CENTERSTONE PROPERTY APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ARNEY, ALYSSA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CENTERSTONE REALTY DBA CENTERSTONE PROPERTY $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, $600.00 , TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,922.00, SEE SCANNED DOC. AND INTEREST ON $3,300.00 AT THE STATUTORY RATE FROM NOV. 8, 2002 TO THE DATE OF JUDGMENT, PLUS $600 (SEE OTHER ABOVE) PURSUANT TO CC 1950.5(K) FOR BAD FAITH. CORNERSTONE REALTY FAILED TO APPEAR. RICHARD A. HORNING, JUDGE PRO TEM
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT CENTERSTONE REALTY DBA CENTERSTONE PROPERTY AS TO RESPONDENT ARNEY, ALYSSA HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-02-2003 - JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. RICHARD A. HORNING, JUDGE PRO TEM. G. PEERLESS, CLK.
